## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] No new certified RWIS / EC / salinity / freezing-point claims.
- [ ] Examples remain dependency-free by default.
- [ ] AVR/Tiny paths avoid heap-heavy output and dynamic allocation.
- [ ] README/API/docs were updated if public behavior changed.
- [ ] Host smoke tests pass locally or in CI.
- [ ] Arduino Lint and compile examples pass in CI.
- [ ] Hardware limitations are documented if validation was not performed.
